title: PM Lane 198 - PM Intake Field Start Bring-Back Summary Triage Strip
summary: Added a `Local Field Start Bring-Back Summary Triage Strip` section inside the existing `Local Field Start Customer/Site Questions Quick Review` panel on `/pm-review/import-intake`.

Placed the strip directly after the field-start conversation closeout prompt review and before the detailed bring-back review queue/lenses so Jason gets the compact category scan before opening detail lenses.

Derived four linked read-only summary cards from existing field questions and field observations: source review context, customer/site clarification context, lead/resource clarification context, and later bounded packet candidate context.

Kept the strip browser-local: no meeting-note capture, no localStorage key, no export artifact, no backend route, no action item, no owner/due-date field, no lead selection, no crew assignment, no schedule/status write, no field instruction, no durable record, no production tracking row, no hosted write claim, and no production write.

Extended the focused read-only PM import-intake smoke to prove desktop presence, 390x844 mobile visibility, four links, zero buttons, no bring-back summary triage strip storage key, no implied-authority link/control text, and zero mutation calls.
Used read-only sidecar Kepler for proof-shaping only; VS Code Codex retained PM lane implementation and final integration authority.
